auth.invalidCredentials: Email or password is incorrect. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.checkEmailSignup: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link to verify your account.
auth.checkEmailAutoVerify: Once verified, this page will take you to the app automatically.
auth.checkEmailSpam: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or try signing up again.
auth.checkEmailReset: If an account exists for {email}, we sent a password reset link.
auth.checkEmailGoogle: Signed in with Google? Just use Continue with Google on the sign-in page instead.
auth.emailVerifiedMessage: Your email has been confirmed. You can close this tab and return to the one where you signed up.
auth.inviteCodeDescription: You should have received a code in your email. Enter it below to create your account.
auth.invalidInviteCode: This code is incorrect or has expired. Double-check and try again.
auth.signInError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.signUpError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.alreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.

pwa.installDescription: Add mabenn to your home screen for the best experience.
pwa.installIosSafari: Tap the share button, then "Add to Home Screen".
pwa.installIosChrome: Tap the share button, then "Add to Home Screen". For the best experience, use Safari.
pwa.installIosOther: Open this page in Safari, then tap the share button and "Add to Home Screen".

landing.heroTitle: Billing clarity for landlords and tenants.
landing.heroSubtitle: Replace spreadsheets and email threads with a shared billing workspace everyone can trust.
landing.heroNote: Be the first to know when we launch.
landing.waitlistSuccess: You're on the list! Check your email for confirmation.
landing.step1Description: Add your units, set up rent and bills, invite your tenants.
landing.step2Description: Email or upload utility bills. We pull out the numbers for you to review.
landing.step3Description: Review, approve, and share a clear breakdown every month.
landing.step4Description: Every charge has a source. Tenants can see where it came from and ask questions.
landing.testimonialQuote: Finally, my tenants stopped texting me asking what they owe.
landing.landlordBenefit1: Manage multiple properties from one place
landing.landlordBenefit2: Bills are read automatically — just review and approve
landing.landlordBenefit3: Publish clear statements tenants can trust
landing.tenantBenefit1: See exactly what you owe and why
landing.tenantBenefit2: See the original bill behind each charge
landing.tenantBenefit4: Flag questions — no more awkward messages
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join the waitlist and be first in line.

home.iOwnPropertyDescription: Set up your property, invite tenants, and manage billing.
home.iRentPropertyDescription: View statements, track payments, and coordinate with roommates.
home.comingSoonDescription: Tenant onboarding is coming soon. For now, ask your landlord to invite you through mabenn.
home.roleNote: You can always add more properties in either role later.

properties.whereIsPropertyDescription: We'll use this address to organize your billing.
properties.propertyNameHint: A name to help you identify this property.
properties.postalCodeNotFound: CEP not found. Please fill in the address manually.
properties.unitsExplanation: A unit is an individual rental space within your property — like an apartment, room, or house.
properties.singleUnit: This property has just one unit
properties.atLeastOneUnit: Add at least one unit to continue.
properties.inviteDescription: Let your tenants know they can view their statements on mabenn. You can always do this later.
properties.alreadyInvited: This tenant has already been invited to this unit.
properties.setupCompleteMessage: {name} is set up with {unitCount, plural, one {# unit} other {# units}}. You can now set up charges or explore your new property.
properties.createFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
properties.inviteFailed: Failed to send invite. Please try again.
